title: 4-Contact Washing Machine Door Lock DFS03857 (16(6) A 250V) – Compatible with Original Codes EBF61315801, EBF61315803 & EBF62534402
features: Main characteristics: The washing machine door lock has the following features: rated voltage 250V, rated current 16(6)A, and 4 contacts. The marking for the washing machine door lock is DFS03857 IE4 T85.
Compatibility: Original codes EBF61315801, EBF61315803, and EBF62534402 for LG.
Functionality: Advanced lock technology securely closes the washing machine door during operation, preventing accidental opening.

Operation sequence: When the programme starts, the door closes, the resistor plates heat up, and the door lock slides into place. Once the washing cycle ends, the resistor plates return to their initial shape, releasing the lock and allowing the door to open.
4-contact design ensures stable electrical communication with the appliance’s control system, avoiding error codes or operational disruptions.
